radio.description: Radio servicing — station fees for 3-month rotation
radio.note: Prices sourced from station rate cards. Subject to negotiation.

influencers.description: Creator/influencer campaigns via TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts

dj_club.description: DJ and club servicing — distribution to DJs and venue playlists

starter.label: Starter
starter.includes: Social media ads (Meta) in 2-3 key markets

standard.label: Standard
standard.includes: Meta + YouTube + TikTok ads across LATAM, A/B creative testing

premium.label: Premium
premium.includes: Full-funnel: awareness + retargeting across all platforms, custom audiences

press.note: Included in base DMM fee — no additional charge for press servicing

dsp_pitching.note: Included in base DMM fee — covers all 6 platforms (Spotify, Apple, Deezer, Amazon, Claro, YouTube)
